decisions.rationale: GUE predicts delta_min ~ N^{-1/3} -> 0, so collision time -> 0+. The system is at the exact phase transition.

decisions.decision: Category 3 (structural) is the only viable proof approach
decisions.rationale: 8 soft/margin approaches killed. Functions without Euler product CAN have off-line zeros. The proof must use the Euler product structurally.

decisions.decision: Connes Q_W is confirmed as the right framework
decisions.rationale: It is the number field analogue of the Castelnuovo intersection positivity that proves RH for function fields.

next_action: Fix Lean build: open WSL terminal directly, run 'source ~/.elan/env && cd /mnt/c/Users/jvaughan/OneDrive/Development/Riemann/lean_proofs && lake exe cache get && lake build RiemannProofs.Basic'. Then attack Connes Q_W wall with criticality insight.
context_notes: Session 31 was the most comprehensive session of the project. 11 computational iterations killed 8 approaches and confirmed GUE, Keating-Snaith, stable margin, growing anchoring. Then 10 Lean 4 files (4212 lines) formalized the full proof landscape including Selberg class, Hadamard product, explicit formula, GUE universality, and a master ProofAtlas. The key insight: the finite-to-infinite transition is THE obstruction — function field RH uses algebra on finite objects, number field RH needs analysis on infinite objects. The Lean build is 95% there — just needs cache decompression fixed interactively.
